_meta.note: Enumerated condition sets are a presentation-level clause-wise rendering of each kernel-v0 record's gloss for the pass-B sheets; the pinned semantic object remains the kot-ast/1 explication (data/kernel-v0/concepts/<slug>.json). Condition-set ids are opaque so pass-B sheets can omit the concept word.

concept_label: end (happening X ends at time T)

conditions.text: Before this time, X is happening.
After this time, X is not happening.
People can know: X happened before this time.

gloss_verbatim: before this time X is happening; after this time X is not happening; people can know: X happened before this time.

concept_label: begin (happening X begins at time T)

conditions.text: Before this time, X is not happening.
At this time, X happens.
After this time, X is happening.

gloss_verbatim: before this time X is not happening; at this time X happens; after this time X is happening.

conditions.text: X thinks about this something: 'it is true.'
X does not know that it is true.

gloss_verbatim: X thinks like this about this something: 'it is true'; X does not know that it is true.

concept_label: friend (X is a friend of Y)

conditions.text: X knows Y.
X thinks about Y: 'when I do things with this someone, I feel something good.'
X thinks about Y: 'I want this someone to feel something good.'
X thinks about Y: 'I don't want this someone to feel something bad.'

gloss_verbatim: X knows Y. X thinks like this about Y: 'when I do things with this someone, I feel something good; I want this someone to feel something good; I don't want this someone to feel something bad.'

conditions.text: Someone did something; because of this, this something exists.
There is another something.
This something is words.
These words say something about that other something.
Because this something exists, the someone who made it can know where that other something is.

gloss_verbatim: someone did something; because of this, there is this something. There is another something. This something is words; these words say something about that other something. Because there is this something, this someone can know where that other something is.

conditions.text: Before now, a breaking happened (a happening of the kind: something breaks).
Because of it, people cannot do things with this something.

gloss_verbatim: before now, some something of kind break happened; because of it, people cannot do things with this something.

conditions.text: X does something with Y at some time.
Before this time, X could say: 'Y is mine.'
After this time, another someone can say: 'Y is mine.'
After this time, X cannot say: 'Y is mine.'

gloss_verbatim: X does something with Y at some time; before this time X could say 'Y is mine'; after this time another someone can say 'Y is mine' and X cannot.

conditions.text: Because X did something at some time, Y exists.
Before this time, Y was not.

gloss_verbatim: because X did something at some time, there is this something; before this time it was not.

conditions.text: Someone did something; because of this, this something exists.
There is another something; the someone who made this something wants to think about that other something after now.
If this someone sees this something, a remembering can happen.
Because this something exists, no forgetting happens.

gloss_verbatim: someone did something; because of this, there is this something. There is another something; this someone wants to think about it after now. If this someone sees this something, some something of kind remember can happen; because there is this something, no something of kind forget happens.

conditions.text: If someone wants to do something, this someone can do it with this something.
Because this something exists, this someone can do many more-good things.

gloss_verbatim: if someone wants to do something, this someone can do it with this something; because there is this something, this someone can do many more-good things.

conditions.text: This something is an event.
It happens at some time.
Before this time, someone does not live.
After this time, this same someone lives.

gloss_verbatim: this something is a something of kind event; it happens at some time; before this time someone does not live; after this time this someone lives.

conditions.text: This something is an event.
It happens at some time.
When it happens, someone dies.
After this time, this someone does not live.

gloss_verbatim: this something is a something of kind event; it happens at some time; when it happens, someone dies; after this time this someone does not live.

conditions.text: This someone thinks: 'someone did some bad something before now.'
This someone thinks: 'I don't want it.'
This someone thinks: 'I want to do something because of this.'
Because of thinking this, this someone feels something bad.

gloss_verbatim: this someone thinks like this: 'someone did some bad something before now; I don't want it; I want to do something (because of this)'; because of this, this someone feels something bad.

conditions.text: This something is a bookmark: someone did something, and because of this, this something exists.
The someone who made it thinks: 'I saw this something before now.'
This someone thinks: 'I don't want to see it now.'
This someone thinks: 'if I want to see it at some time after now, I can see it at this time.'

gloss_verbatim: someone did something; because of this, there is this something [the bookmark]. When archived is true of it, this someone thinks like this: 'I saw this something before now; I don't want to see it now; if I want to see it at some time after now, I can see it at this time.'

conditions.text: This something is words.
Someone says these words to someone else.
The one who says them knows they are not true.
The one who says them says them because they want the other one to think these words are true.

gloss_verbatim: this something is words; someone says them to someone else; this someone knows they are not true; this someone says them because this someone wants the other someone to think they are true.

conditions.text: Before now, a losing happened to this something (a happening of the kind: someone loses something).
Someone does not know now at which place this something is.

gloss_verbatim: before now, some something of kind lose happened; someone does not know now at which place this something is.

conditions.text: Before now, X did not know where Y is.
Because X did something, X sees Y now.
X knows now: Y is at this place.

gloss_verbatim: before now X did not know where Y is; because X did something, X sees Y now; X knows now: Y is at this place.

conditions.text: This something is words.
Someone says these words to someone else.
In saying them, the sayer says: 'after now I will do something.'
In saying them, the sayer says: 'I know you want it.'
In saying them, the sayer says: 'you can know: after now I will do it.'

gloss_verbatim: this something is words. Someone says them to someone else, saying: 'after now I will do something; I know you want it; (because I say this) you can know: after now I will do it.'

conditions.text: This someone thinks: 'some very bad something can happen after now.'
This someone thinks: 'I don't want it.'
This someone thinks: 'maybe it will happen.'
Because of thinking this, this someone feels something bad.

gloss_verbatim: this someone thinks like this: 'some very bad something can happen after now; I don't want it; maybe it will happen'; because of this, this someone feels something bad.

conditions.text: X does something to Y at some time.
Before this time, Y is broken.
After this time, Y is not broken.
After this time, people can do things with Y.

gloss_verbatim: X does something to Y at some time; before this time Y is broken; after this time Y is not broken; after this time people can do things with Y.
